channel.title: Go Humble! RSS Games
channel.description: Awesome RSS Feeds about HumbleBundle games bundles!

item.title: Arc System Works: Evo Collection
item.description: Play Fighting Games. Fight for Something Bigger.
item.content:encoded:
What’s better than getting a collection of fighting games from Arc System Works in celebration of Evo 2026? Supporting the fight against rare disease while you’re at it. Throw hands in style with big-time fighting games that dominate the competitive scene. Dive into an epic bundle of Guilty Gear titles highlighted by the dynamic 2D x 3D hybrid Guilty Gear -STRIVE-, alongside all five available Season Passes. Or challenge your skills in competitive staples like BlazBlue: Central Fiction and Under Night In-Birth II. Your bundle purchase supports the Raiden Science Foundation and its Fight4Rare initiative, helping ignite hope and advance rare disease treatment and research.

Keys expire. Please redeem before July 17th, 2027.

item.title: Going Rogue: A Lite Heavy Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Dive into adventure and mystery with this bundle of roguelike and roguelite action games! Make a deal with a demon to exact revenge on your murderer in Brutal Orchestra! Survive a decaying spaceship full of killer monsters in the procedurally generated deep space purgatory of Moros Protocol! Take on the adventures and challenges of these roguelikes and more in this bundle, and support Team Rubicon with your purchase at the price of your choice!

Keys expire. Please redeem Moros Protocol before January 15th 2027 and remaining titles before July 15th, 2027.

item.title: June 2unes
item.content:encoded:
Get the beats bumping and the tunes thumping with this bundle of rhythm games that really jam! Slay monsters with the power of music to find your lost voice in Everhood 2! Toot your own horn and solve the mysteries of the Trombiverse in Trombone Champ! Test your color matching skills and enter the Rhythm Dimension in retro arcade game Spin Rhythm XD! There’s even more music and mayhem to enjoy in this mixtape of our favorite rhythm games, so grab them now at the price of your choosing, and support StackUp with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before July 10th, 2027.

item.title: Upload VR Summer 2026
item.content:encoded:
Freshen up your VR collection with an epic bundle of titles perfect for any platform. Jump into the cockpit of a wide variety of aircraft in VTOL VR, a near-futuristic combat flight game built to get your heart pumping! Brave Metro Awakening, a story-driven VR adventure that blends exploration and FPS gameplay to deliver a completely immersive experience. Or get a lil’ strange with Among Us 3D, a new twist on the original game’s formula that drops you into chaos! Step out of reality and into a world of savings—plus, your purchase helps support Kiss the Ground!

Keys expire. Please redeem before July 8th, 2027.

item.title: Dungeon Defenders II Complete DLC Chest
item.description: Defend your friends and loot your enemies!
item.content:encoded:
Are you ready to join the fight for Etheria? If you’re enjoying the free-to-play Dungeon Defenders II and want to level up your game, we’ve got all of the DLC in one bundle at a great discount! Take to the stars with the Celestial Vault Pack, bask in the eldritch glow of the Ethereal Trove Pack, equip your heroes with the Adventurer’s Arsenal Pack, and more! This bundle even includes a Golden Headless Horseman Premium Pet that will plague your enemies with tormented thoughts! Grab this bundle while you can to level up your forces and save your lands from evil, pay whatever price you want, and support coral reef ecosystem nonprofit Coral Guardian with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before July 8th, 2027.

item.title: Yuri in Luck: Waifus for Laifus
item.content:encoded:
The content in this bundle is intended for mature audiences.

Find love, companionship, and maybe a little romance with the Yuri in Luck: Waifus for Laifus Bundle—a colorful collection of LGBTQ+-themed yuri titles! Play “Yuri Cupid” in Kindred Spirits on the Roof, a slice-of-life tale of love, loss, lust, and friendship. Lead a romantic cat-and-mouse game with a supernatural spin across a gorgeous watercolor-style backdrop in OshiRabu: Waifus Over Husbandos. Or lose yourself in SeaBed, a deep psychological mystery visual novel told through the perspectives of three unique characters. Plus, your purchase helps support our friends at Dames 4 Games.

Keys expire. Please redeem before July 1st, 2027.

item.title: The Complete Inkle Library
item.content:encoded:
Dive into worlds unknown and challenges unconquered with this bundle of interactive narrative puzzle games from Inkle! Search through an archive of lost books hidden inside an old computer to solve the secrets of TR-49! Decipher the language of an ancient civilization hidden inside a nebula in Heaven’s Vault! Climb, jump, run, and sing your way through the rainy Scottish highlands in A Highland Song! Take on Jules Verne’s legendary trip around the world in the award-winning globetrotting game 80 Days! There are even more Inkle classics to be found in this exciting bundle, so get it now at the price of your choice and help support Breakthrough T1D with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before January 1st, 2027.

item.title: Redline Racing Bundle
item.description: Breakneck speed is all you need
item.content:encoded:
Buckle up for a furiously fast collection of unique and exciting racing games with the Redline Racing Bundle! Play Assetto Corsa Competizione, the official GT World Challenge video game experience, and more. Hit curves at top speeds in Art of Rally, a stylized, top-down take on rally car racing, compete on the iconic tracks of Japan’s legendary EBISU circuit in Drift CE, or try extreme downhill freeriding in Descenders, a bike racer where mistakes have real consequences! Dominate the tracks and help support the Starlight Children’s Foundation with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 26th, 2027.

item.title: We Will Always Be Here: Pride Month 2026
item.content:encoded:
Celebrate Pride Month 2026 with a bundle of queer-centric and inclusive games of all genres! Battle your exes and take on surreal cooking challenges in the outrageously fun “breakup simulator” Thirsty Suitors! Save the worlds of mortals and gods by looking into the future in the gorgeous adventure game Harmony: The Fall of Reverie! Run your dream D&D-inspired tavern in a cozy fantasy world in the charming visual novel Tavern Talk! There’s even more adventure, romance, and fun to be found in this bundle, so grab it now at the price of your choosing and support the Trevor Project with your purchase!

Keys expire. All titles should be redeemed before June 6th, 2027.
